packageRules.description: Auto-merge digest updates silently (same version, rebuilt layers)
Auto-merge pin updates silently (pins floating tag to digest)
Auto-merge patch updates (bug fixes, backwards-compatible) — excludes 0.x, which the 0.x rule below force-holds for review
Label minor updates for manual review (Docker minors can break)
Label major updates for careful review (breaking by definition)
NEVER auto-merge 0.x packages (semver allows breaking in any 0.x release)
Group dev-dependency minor+patch bumps into one review PR (cuts PR noise; devDep patches ride the weekly group instead of auto-merging individually)
Never bump our own GHCR images — built in CI, not pulled. Centralizes the per-repo ignoreDeps and prevents the self-image auto-merge loop.
xyOps is the production scheduler — never auto-merge/auto-deploy unattended; review and deploy by hand.

Upstream-app docker bumps: open PR on day 0 (no internal-checks suppression). Automerge still respects the 3-day stability window via the renovate/stability-days status check on the PR. Fixes the 'Pending Status Checks' deadlock for repos without PR-side CI (most upstream apps).
Pin postgres to 18.x line — major bumps are destructive (require pg_upgrade or dump/restore). Edit this regex when scheduling a planned 18 → 19 migration.
Pin mariadb to the 11.4 LTS line (supported until 2029-05). Edit this regex when scheduling a planned LTS migration. Centralized from mariadb-shared-hetzner.

MediaFusion ships only prerelease beta tags (6.0.0-beta.NN). Default docker versioning treats -beta.NN as a compatibility suffix and never updates between betas; use semver so it parses as a prerelease and force unstable updates so Renovate follows the beta line. Held for manual review (betas can break a live service). Centralized from mediafusion-personal.
Self-built apps tracked via the github-releases customManager (e.g. aiometadata): track stable releases only, no prereleases. Centralized from aiometadata-personal.

linuxserver.io images tag as X.Y.Z[.BUILD]-lsN; default docker versioning can't compare the -lsN suffix, so updates (e.g. prowlarr) were silently missed. Parse with regex versioning; optional groups also cover plain X.Y.Z linuxserver tags (e.g. speedtest-tracker).

customManagers.description: Track self-built apps that pin an upstream GitHub release tag in their compose build context (e.g. context: "https://github.com/<owner>/<repo>.git#vX.Y.Z"). Centralized from aiometadata-personal.
